title: DCP ArchitectureImpact
description: A stated assessment of how a change affects a system's architecture. Descriptive only.

impact_level.description: Assessment vocabulary: none, low, moderate, high, breaking. 'breaking' subsumes any breaking-change flag (no separate boolean). Tolerate-and-pass unknown values.

affected_areas.description: Opaque component labels. Descriptive only; not routing targets.
